case_title: BADEA IBRAHIM MOUSA VS. HUSAIN NASIR et al

docket_entries.description: NOTICE TO PLAINTIFF

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT HUSAIN NASIR'S DEMURRER TO CAUSES OF ACTION FOR THEFT, EMBEZZLEMENT AND FRAUD IN COMPLAINT OF BADEA IBRAHIM MOUSA. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING - DEFENDANT'S DEMURRER TO THE 2ND CAUSE OF ACTION (FRAUD) OVERRULED. PLAINTIFF HAS PLED FACTS WITH SUFFICIENT PARTICULARITY TO STATE A CLAIM. DEFENDANT'S DEMURRER TO THE 4TH AND 5TH CAUSES OF ACTION (EMBEZLEMENT AND THEFT) IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND. THESE ARE CRIMINAL CLAIMS. PLAINTIFF MAY PLEAD CONVERSION IN THE ALTERNATIVE. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: LORETTA M. GIORGI, REPORTER: KARLA ELLIS-DAVIS, CSR #12998

MINI MINUTES:
DEFENDANT HUSAIN NASIR'S DEMURRER TO CAUSES OF ACTION FOR THEFT, EMBEZZLEMENT AND FRAUD IN COMPLAINT OF BADEA IBRAHIM MOUSA.

APPEARANCES: Taghi Astanehe, Esq. 771-6174 for pltf & opposing party; no other appearances.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling - DEFENDANT'S DEMURRER TO THE 2ND CAUSE OF ACTION (FRAUD) OVERRULED. PLAINTIFF HAS PLED FACTS WITH SUFFICIENT PARTICULARITY TO STATE A CLAIM. DEFENDANT'S DEMURRER TO THE 4TH AND 5TH CAUSES OF ACTION (EMBEZLEMENT AND THEFT) IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND. THESE ARE CRIMINAL CLAIMS. PLAINTIFF MAY PLEAD CONVERSION IN THE ALTERNATIVE. Order signed in open court. (302/LMG) Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi, Reporter: Karla Ellis-Davis, CSR #12998
